_note: apps/web is statically exported into apps/web/out and bundled inside the apps/local binary. It is NOT meant to be deployed to Vercel as a standalone site — it has no backend, no WebSocket server, and no activation API. If Vercel auto-discovered this directory, delete the project. The Vercel target for this repo is apps/cloud.
ignoreCommand: echo 'apps/web is bundled inside apps/local; do not deploy standalone' && exit 1
